name: cicd
description: GitHub Actions / Docker / GHCR pipeline troubleshooting and config — auto-routes backend (Prisma/Biome) vs frontend (Vite). Deep self-hosted runner runbook (systemd + containerized myoung34) covering token chicken-and-egg, ACCESS_TOKEN/PAT migration, deprecated-binary and deleted-registration crashloops, and stacked failures that unmask one another. Also GHCR auth/TLS-handshake-timeout, reverse-proxy upstream poisoning by compose-run orphans, bind-mount EACCES, monorepo tsx/tsc-b pitfalls. Triggers — CI/CD, GitHub Actions, GHCR auth, self-hosted runner, runner crashloop, registration token expired/deleted, runner version deprecated, compose run orphan, deploy stuck/queued (silent).
